title: RGB Beacon
body:
Tired of your bluish-white beacon? Is one color at a time not enough for you? Then this resource pack is just for you! Introducing: RGB Beacon! It makes the beacon beam — and everything related to it — fully RGB. Enjoy your beacon cycling through the entire color wheel with just this one resource pack!!

![RGB Beacon Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbef1a278673947402ec1504fbf848905d251bf0.gif)

Not a fan of the textures I made? Don't worry — me neither! The "Only Beam" version is out now! Just grab the one ending with "OB" - it should also be in changelog :)

![RGB Beacon Only Beam Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a86cf68fb16a1b65f5241a1f0e32ed13c9d5ed6.gif)
